summary: First iteration: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of revoloai mobile web preview. All 6 backend pytest cases pass (root, 3 avatars, invalid name, status). All 30+ UI elements & flows validated end-to-end via Playwright at mobile viewport (390x844). Avatars (Maya/Sofia/Aria) render correctly across hero/cards/sections/chat/final CTA/bottom nav (16 img tags, all 400x400 PNGs loaded ok). Sticky CTA dynamically updates ('Start with Sofia' -> Maya -> Aria) on bottom-nav taps. Language selector switches active state. All testIDs present.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with {error:'not found'} instead of HTTP 404. Functional but not idiomatic.

issues: Sticky bottom bar (~140px tall) can briefly cover content while scrolling but ScrollView has matching paddingBottom; functioning as designed

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' Non-blocking but should migrate to boxShadow for RN Web compatibility
'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode' warning from Expo logs (only affects native RNImage path, not web )
expo-linear-gradient@55.0.13 expected ~15.0.8 per Expo doctor; not breaking but version mismatch flagged

action_items: (Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow on web platform (cardShadow + primaryBtn + stickyCta) to silence console warnings
(Optional) Replace style.resizeMode with resizeMode prop on RN <Image> components (heroAvatar/avatarImg/personImg/finalAvatar styles)
(Optional) Return HTTP 404 for unknown avatar names instead of 200 with error JSON
(Optional) Align expo-linear-gradient version with Expo SDK expectation
critical_code_review_comments: index.tsx is 1473 lines — consider splitting into per-section components (Hero, Trust, Avatars, Pricing, Bundles, Chat, Account) under /app/components for maintainability
Plans data (jobsPlans/interviewPlans/coachPlans/bundles/langs) should live in a separate constants/data module
Avatar component duplicates resizeMode logic — could centralize
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (pytest). Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (note: not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Avatar component uses raw on web for reliable rendering — confirmed working. Mobile preview at 390x844. All testIDs verified: hero-cta-primary, install-btn, lang-{8 langs}, trust-{4}, avatar-{maya/sofia/aria}, service-card-{0..2,10..12,20..22}, bundle-{0..2}, final-start-btn, bottom-nav-{maya/sofia/aria}, sticky-cta.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no critical bugs found. App fully functional per requirements.
